name: M16A1 Assault Rifle
prompt:
Vietnam War era Colt M16A1 assault rifle. The iconic American infantry weapon of the conflict.

Physical structure (real-world proportions, ~1m total length):
- Upper receiver: flat-top with integral carrying handle (triangular profile with rear sight aperture)
- Lower receiver: with pistol grip (black), trigger guard, magazine well
- Barrel: 20-inch with triangular front sight post on base, birdcage flash hider at muzzle
- Handguard: distinctive triangular cross-section, two-piece (top and bottom), black
- Stock: fixed A1 buttstock, black polymer, with buttplate
- Magazine: 20-round straight aluminum magazine, matte gray, inserted in magazine well
- Forward assist: small cylindrical button on right side of upper receiver
- Charging handle: T-shape at rear of upper receiver
- Bayonet lug: under front sight base

Colors: Black receiver/furniture (0x1a1a1a), gray magazine (0x707070), dark metal barrel (0x2a2a2a)
Orientation: Lying flat, barrel pointing along +Z axis, right side up
Scale: Real-world meters (total length ~1.0m)
animations: No animation needed for weapon prop
